mapper.select: SELECT TE.ID AS eduId, TE.EDU_TITLE AS eduTitle, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN TEWM.ID END) / COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID) * 100 ) END AS progress, NVL( ROUND( ( CAST(NVL(MAX(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT), SYSDATE) AS DATE) - CAST(TES.EDU_START_AT AS DATE) ) * 24 * 60 * 60 ), 0 ) AS studyTime, MAX(NVL(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT, TES.EDU_START_AT)) AS recentStudyAt FROM TBL_EDU_START TES JOIN TBL_EDU TE ON TES.EDU_ID = TE.ID JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM ON TE.ID = TEWM.EDU_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WORD_STUDY TWS ON TEWM.ID = TWS.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID AND TWS.USER_ID = TES.USER_ID WHERE TES.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 GROUP BY TE.ID, TE.EDU_TITLE, TES.EDU_START_AT HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN TEWM.ID END) < COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID) ORDER BY MAX(NVL(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT, TES.EDU_START_AT)) DESC, TE.ID ASC

SELECT TE.ID AS quizAttemptId, TE.ID AS quizId, TE.EDU_TITLE AS quizTitle, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN TEWM.ID END) AS correctCount, COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID) AS totalCount, NVL( ROUND( ( CAST(MAX(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT) AS DATE) - CAST(TES.EDU_START_AT AS DATE) ) * 24 * 60 * 60 ), 0 ) AS spentTime, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN TEWM.ID END) / COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID) * 100 ) END AS accuracy, MAX(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT) AS quizAttemptCreateAt FROM TBL_EDU_START TES JOIN TBL_EDU TE ON TES.EDU_ID = TE.ID JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM ON TE.ID = TEWM.EDU_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WORD_STUDY TWS ON TEWM.ID = TWS.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID AND TWS.USER_ID = TES.USER_ID WHERE TES.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 GROUP BY TE.ID, TE.EDU_TITLE, TES.EDU_START_AT HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN TEWM.ID END) = COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID) ORDER BY MAX(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT) DESC, TE.ID ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN TOTAL_WORD_COUNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COMPLETED_WORD_COUNT / TOTAL_WORD_COUNT * 100) END AS totalAccuracy, COMPLETED_WORD_COUNT AS totalQuestionCount, TOTAL_STUDY_TIME AS totalStudyTime FROM ( SELECT NVL(SUM(LEARN_SUMMARY.TOTAL_WORD_COUNT), 0) AS TOTAL_WORD_COUNT, NVL(SUM(LEARN_SUMMARY.COMPLETED_WORD_COUNT), 0) AS COMPLETED_WORD_COUNT, NVL(SUM(LEARN_SUMMARY.STUDY_TIME), 0) AS TOTAL_STUDY_TIME FROM ( SELECT TES.EDU_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT TEWM.ID) AS TOTAL_WORD_COUNT, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN TEWM.ID END) AS COMPLETED_WORD_COUNT, ROUND( ( CAST(NVL(MAX(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT), SYSDATE) AS DATE) - CAST(TES.EDU_START_AT AS DATE) ) * 24 * 60 * 60 ) AS STUDY_TIME FROM TBL_EDU_START TES JOIN TBL_EDU TE ON TES.EDU_ID = TE.ID JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM ON TE.ID = TEWM.EDU_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WORD_STUDY TWS ON TEWM.ID = TWS.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID AND TWS.USER_ID = TES.USER_ID WHERE TES.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 GROUP BY TES.EDU_ID, TES.EDU_START_AT ) LEARN_SUMMARY )
